channel.title: Claude Blog
channel.description: Product news and best practices for teams building with Claude.

item.title: Preparing your security program for AI-accelerated offense
item.description: We share our initial set of recommendations to shore up your defenses based on our own findings and security practices.

item.title: Multi-agent coordination patterns: Five approaches and when to use them
item.description: Five multi-agent coordination patterns, their trade-offs, and when to evolve from one to another.

item.title: Seeing like an agent: how we design tools in Claude Code
item.description: Building Claude Code: How Anthropic designs and refines AI agent tools like AskUserQuestion and Task tool. The key is progressive disclosure and learning to "see like an agent" to maximize effectiveness.

item.title: Making Claude Cowork ready for enterprise
item.description: Claude Cowork is now generally available on all paid plans. Within companies, Claude Cowork has become a key part of how teams operate: handling tasks, drafting project deliverables, and keeping teams up to date.

item.title: The advisor strategy: Give agents an intelligence boost
item.description: Pair Opus as an advisor with Sonnet or Haiku as an executor, and get Opus-level intelligence in your agents at a fraction of the cost.

item.title: How Carta Healthcare gets AI to reason like a clinical abstractor
item.description: How Carta Healthcare used Claude and context engineering to build Lighthouse, a clinical abstraction platform reaching 99% accuracy across 22,000 cases a year.

item.title: Claude Managed Agents: get to production 10x faster
item.description: Introducing Claude Managed Agents, a suite of composable APIs for building and deploying cloud-hosted agents at scale.

item.title: How and when to use subagents in Claude Code
item.description: When to delegate research, parallelize tasks, or get a fresh review with Claude Code subagents—and when to stick with the main session.

item.title: Harnessing Claude’s intelligence
item.description: Three patterns for building on the Claude Platform that keep pace with Claude's evolving intelligence while balancing latency and cost.

item.title: Audit Claude Platform activity with the Compliance API
item.description: The Compliance API gives admins programmatic access to audit logs across their Claude Platform organization.

item.title: Auto mode for Claude Code
item.description: Auto mode lets Claude Code make permission decisions with built-in safeguards — fewer interruptions than default, less risk than skipping permissions.

item.title: Put Claude to work on your computer
item.description: Claude now opens your apps, navigates your browser, and runs your dev tools to complete tasks. Assign from your phone with Dispatch. Research preview on macOS.

item.title: Product management on the AI exponential
item.description: Claude Code’s Head of Product Cat Wu shares how teams should rethink their workflows and roadmaps in the face of rapidly evolving model intelligence.

item.title: Code with Claude comes to San Francisco, London, and Tokyo
item.description: Technical sessions, live demos of new capabilities, and office hours with Anthropic engineers—watch live or apply to attend.

item.title: 1M context is now generally available for Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6
item.description: Standard pricing now applies across the full 1M window for both models, with no long-context premium. Media limits expand to 600 images or PDF pages.

item.title: Claude now creates interactive charts, diagrams and visualizations
item.description: Ask Claude to explain a concept or analyze your data, and it can respond with interactive charts, diagrams, and visualizations — rendered inline as part of the conversation.

item.title: Advancing Claude for Excel and PowerPoint
item.description: Claude for Excel and PowerPoint now share full context across open files, and skills make any workflow instantly repeatable.

item.title: Bringing Code Review to Claude Code
item.description: Claude Code now dispatches a team of agents on every PR to catch bugs that skims miss. Available in research preview for Team and Enterprise.

item.title: Common workflow patterns for AI agents—and when to use them
item.description: Practical guidance on how to structure agent tasks using three common workflow patterns, with tradeoffs and benefits for each.

item.title: Improving skill-creator: Test, measure, and refine Agent Skills
item.description: Skill authors now have tools to verify their skills work, catch regressions, and improve descriptions—no coding required.

item.title: Cowork and plugins for teams across the enterprise
item.description: We're introducing Cowork and plugin updates that let enterprises customize Claude to how you work. Plugins turn Claude into specialized agents for every role and department. Now, you can build private marketplaces to distribute them across your organization.

item.title: Cowork and plugins for finance
item.description: New plugins built for how finance actually works, plus cross-app workflows that move with you from Excel to PowerPoint to final deliverable.

item.title: How AI helps break the cost barrier to COBOL modernization
item.description: The economics of COBOL modernization have shifted. AI makes the economics work by automating what used to require armies of consultants.

item.title: Bringing automated preview, review, and merge to Claude Code on desktop
item.description: Preview running apps, auto-review diffs, and monitor PRs — all from Claude Code on desktop. Go from writing code to merging in one place.

item.title: Increase web search accuracy and efficiency with dynamic filtering
item.description: Claude's web search and web fetch tools now use code execution to dynamically filter results before they reach the context window. Benchmarks show accuracy gains averaging 11% while using 24% fewer input tokens. Available now on the API.

item.title: Claude Enterprise, now available self-serve
item.description: Starting today, any organization can purchase Claude Enterprise directly on our website with no sales conversation required. Set up your workspace, configure SSO, and start inviting team members in minutes.

item.title: Behind the model launch: What customers discovered testing Claude Opus 4.6 early
item.description: Four customer teams tested Opus 4.6 before anyone else. See their testing approaches, technical breakthroughs, and the feedback that shaped the release.

item.title: Advancing finance with Claude Opus 4.6
item.description: With Claude Opus 4.6, finance teams get better reasoning on complex analyses, cleaner first-pass deliverables, and new tools built for where analysts actually spend their time.

item.title: Customize Cowork with plugins
item.description: With Cowork, you set the goal and Claude delivers finished, professional work. Plugins let you go further: tell Claude how you like work done, which tools and data to pull from, how to handle critical workflows, and what slash commands to expose so your team gets even better and more consistent outcomes.

item.title: Understand Claude Code’s impact with contribution metrics
item.description: Measure how Claude Code impacts your team's velocity. Track PRs shipped and code committed with GitHub integration—no extra tools required.

item.title: A complete guide to building skills for Claude
item.description: How to build skills that give Claude reusable context for your workflows. Covers technical requirements, testing approaches, and workflow patterns from early adopters.

item.title: Updates to Claude Team
item.description: We're making the Claude Team plan more accessible for growing teams. We’re lowering prices and introducing an annual discount for premium seats.

item.title: How leading retailers are turning AI pilots into enterprise-wide transformation
item.description: A practical guide for retail executives implementing AI at scale. Includes case studies from Shopify, L'Oréal, and Lotte Homeshopping with measurable results.

item.title: How Anthropic's Growth Marketing team cut ad creation time from 30 minutes to 30 seconds with Claude Code
item.description: Marketers spend hours creating ad variations and refreshing copy across platforms. Learn how Anthropic's growth team uses Claude Code to cut ad creation from 30 minutes to 30 seconds—no coding required.

item.title: Your favorite work tools are now interactive connectors inside Claude
item.description: MCP Apps bring interactive connectors to Claude. Interact with connectors with a live UI right in your conversation — no tab-switching required.

item.title: Building multi-agent systems: When and how to use them
item.description: Most teams don't need multi-agent systems. Learn the three scenarios where they consistently outperform single agents—and how to implement them effectively.

item.title: Building agents with Skills: Equipping agents for specialized work
item.description: Learn how Agent Skills package domain expertise for AI agents—turning capable generalists into knowledgeable specialists through organized files and workflows.

item.title: Eight trends defining how software gets built in 2026
item.description: How engineering teams are shifting from writing code to orchestrating agents. Eight trends, real-world case studies, and predictions for 2026.

item.title: Extending Claude’s capabilities with skills and MCP servers
item.description: Learn how skills and MCP work together to build agents that follow your workflows and use external tools effectively. Best practices and real-world examples.

item.title: Skills for organizations, partners, the ecosystem
item.description: In October, we introduced skills—a way to teach Claude repeatable workflows tailored to how you work. Today we're making skills easier to deploy, discover, and build: organization-wide management for admins; a directory of partner-built skills from Notion, Canva, Figma, Atlassian, and others; and an open standard so skills work across AI platforms.

item.title: Making Claude a better electrical engineer
item.description: Anthropic partnered with Diode Computers to improve Claude's ability to auto-generate PCB reference designs in the Zener language, with measurable gains in Sonnet 4.5.

item.title: Claude Code power user customization: How to configure hooks
item.description: Learn how to configure Claude Code hooks to automate repetitive tasks, enforce project rules, and inject dynamic context into your coding sessions.

item.title: How enterprises are building AI agents in 2026
item.description: New research from 500+ technical leaders reveals how enterprises are deploying AI agents in 2026—and why 80% already report measurable ROI.

item.title: Claude Code and Slack
item.description: Now you can tag @Claude in Slack to spin up Claude Code sessions automatically. Turn bug reports and feature requests into code fixes, get status updates in your thread, and open pull requests—all without leaving Slack.

item.title: How Anthropic's legal team cut review times from days to hours with Claude
item.description: Marketers spend hours creating ad variations and refreshing copy across platforms. Learn how Anthropic's growth team uses Claude Code to cut ad creation from 30 minutes to 30 seconds—no coding required.

item.title: What are the key benefits of transitioning to agentic coding for software development?
item.description: Learn how agentic coding with Claude Code accelerates development timelines, simplifies onboarding, and helps teams ship better software faster.

item.title: Using CLAUDE.md files: Customizing Claude Code for your codebase
item.description: Learn how to use CLAUDE.md files to give Claude Code persistent context about your project structure, coding standards, and workflows.

item.title: What’s new in Claude: Turning Claude into your thinking partner
item.description: Your best work takes iteration. Claude now stays with you through the process—remembering context, talking through ideas, and turning them into real work.

item.title: How to create Skills: Key steps, limitations, and examples
item.description: Learn how to write custom skills that extend Claude's capabilities. Follow our 5-step guide with real examples to build specialized workflows for your tasks.

item.title: How three YC startups built their companies with Claude Code
item.description: Learn how three YC startups use Claude Code to ship products faster, win government contracts, and scale AI-powered platforms with agentic coding workflows.

item.title: Structured outputs on the Claude Developer Platform
item.description: Structured outputs on the Claude Developer Platform guarantee API responses match your JSON schemas and tool definitions. Now in public beta for Sonnet 4.5 and Opus 4.1, this feature eliminates parsing errors and failed tool calls for production applications.

item.title: Skills explained: How Skills compares to prompts, Projects, MCP, and subagents
item.description: Skills are an increasingly powerful tool for creating custom AI workflows and agents, but where do they fit in the Claude stack? We explain what tool to use when - and how they all work together.

item.title: Improving frontend design through Skills
item.description: Best practices for building richer, more customized frontend design with Claude and Skills.

item.title: Best practices for prompt engineering
item.description: Master the art of prompt engineering with Claude.

item.title: Building AI agents for startups
item.description: For resource-constrained startups, AI agents autonomously handle complex processes, reclaiming founder time, providing expert-level capabilities, and maintaining quality while moving fast.

item.title: What is Model Context Protocol? Connect AI to your world
item.description: Connect AI assistants to your tools without custom integrations using Model Context Protocol. AI models are only as good as the context provided to them. AI assistants like Claude can answer questions and perform an impressive range of tasks, but if they can't access the data or tools they need,...

item.title: How Brex improves code quality and productivity with Claude Code
item.description: Learn how Claude Code breaks down barriers between technical and non-technical teams by making programming easier and more accessible.

item.title: Building AI agents for financial services
item.description: Financial institutions are deploying autonomous AI systems to improve operations while navigating regulatory complexity and risk. Here's how. ‍ In financial services, AI agents are moving beyond pilot programs to deliver concrete business value.

item.title: Building AI agents for healthcare and life sciences
item.description: AI agents are delivering measurable results in healthcare and life sciences while navigating the industry's unique regulatory complexity and safety standards. Here's how.

item.title: Introduction to agentic coding
item.description: Move from fragmented AI code snippets to deploying integrated features with agentic coding that understands your entire codebase. AI-assisted coding has evolved rapidly over the last few years. Tools that once suggested the next line now predict entire functions by analyzing patterns in your code.

item.title: Fix software bugs faster with Claude
item.description: Turn debugging from detective work into systematic problem-solving. Analyze errors, trace root causes, and implement fixes faster. Debugging code is time-consuming and tedious. And the hardest part isn't usually fixing the bug itself; it’s understanding why your code broke in the first place.

item.title: How to integrate APIs seamlessly
item.description: Build resilient API integrations from the start. Handle authentication, rate limits, and edge cases before they break production. API integration failures cost hours you can't afford. Authentication tokens expire during critical workflows, triggering 401 errors that cascade through your services.

item.title: Claude Code on the web
item.description: Today, we're introducing Claude Code on the web, a new way to delegate coding tasks directly from your browser. Now in beta as a research preview, you can assign multiple coding tasks to Claude that run on Anthropic-managed cloud infrastructure, perfect for tackling bug backlogs, routine fixes, or...

item.title: Introducing Agent Skills
item.description: Claude can now use Skills to improve how it performs specific tasks. Skills are folders that include instructions, scripts, and resources that Claude can load when needed. Claude will only access a skill when it's relevant to the task at hand.

item.title: Claude and your productivity platforms
item.description: Claude now integrates with Microsoft 365 and offers enterprise search across your connected tools. Claude works with the productivity tools you use every day, bringing context from your documents, emails, and calendar directly into your conversations.

item.title: Equipping agents for the real world with Agent Skills
item.description: Discover how Anthropic builds AI agents with practical capabilities through modular skills, enabling them to handle complex real-world tasks more effectively and reliably.

item.title: How to scale agentic coding across your engineering organization
item.description: As Agentic coding tools mature, technical leaders are wrestling with a practical challenge: moving beyond isolated experiments to organization-wide adoption.

item.title: Build responsive web layouts
item.description: Generate responsive designs that work across all devices, without the trial and error. Responsive layouts often behave unpredictably across viewport sizes. A three-column card grid that displays perfectly on desktop can become illegible on tablets, with text overflowing containers and navigation...

item.title: Customize Claude Code with plugins
item.description: Claude Code now supports plugins: custom collections of slash commands, agents, MCP servers, and hooks that install with a single command. Share your Claude Code setup with plugins Slash commands, agents, MCP servers, and hooks are all extension points you can use to customize your experience with...

item.title: Beyond permission prompts: making Claude Code more secure and autonomous
item.description: In Claude Code, Claude writes, tests, and debugs code alongside you, navigating your codebase, editing multiple files, and running commands to verify its work.

item.title: Optimize code performance quickly
item.description: Go from reactive profiling to proactive optimization. Find and fix bottlenecks in your codebase before they slow down production. Performance bottlenecks sneak up on you. Your API was fast last week, but now it's timing out. User dashboards that load instantly are suddenly crawling.

item.title: Claude and Slack
item.description: Access Claude directly into Slack so you can get help in channels and threads, or connect your Slack workspace to Claude for searching conversations and pulling context when you need it.

item.title: How enterprises are driving AI transformation with Claude
item.description: As the leader in enterprise AI, Anthropic builds state-of-the-art models specializing in industries where precision matters, from coding and cybersecurity to financial services. Claude Sonnet 4.

item.title: Managing context on the Claude Developer Platform
item.description: New context editing and memory tools enable Claude agents to handle long-running tasks without hitting context limits.

item.title: Building agents with the Claude Agent SDK
item.description: How to get started with the Claude Agent SDK and best practices for using it.

item.title: Claude is now available in Microsoft 365 Copilot
item.description: Today, Microsoft announced that Claude models are now available in Microsoft 365 Copilot, bringing Claude to millions of enterprise users through Microsoft's productivity platform.
